mapper.select: select u.id, u.password_hash as password, u.staff_id, u.role_id as roleId, u.status, s.name as staffName, u.username as username from sys_user u left join staff_member s on s.id = u.staff_id where u.username = #{username}

select u.id, u.username, u.staff_id, u.role_id as roleId, u.status, s.name as staffName, u.update_time, u.create_time, u.last_login_time as lastLoginTime from sys_user u left join staff_member s on s.id = u.staff_id where u.id = #{id}
